title: Claude Fable + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates a faceless YouTube channel production system using Claude Fable 5 Code to automatically edit videos, Higsfield CLI for image-to-video generation, and Auphonic for audio processing. The system reverse-engineers successful channels like Fireship, scripts content with Claude, and produces edited videos at roughly $2 per video for YouTube monetization.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a faceless YouTube production pipeline aimed at monetization, combining Claude Fable 5 Code for automated video editing, Higsfield CLI for image-to-video generation, and Auphonic for audio processing. The workflow reverse-engineers established channels such as Fireship and uses Claude to script content, with edited videos produced at roughly $2 each. The takeaway is an end-to-end, automation-heavy approach to content creation tied to a stated $30,000 per month target.
